calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing. No appearance by defendant(s).
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Elizabeth L. Hurwitz, Esq., for the Plaintiff SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY.
Kendra Crawford sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant GIRLS AFTER SCHOOL ACADEMY.
Defendants Does 1-10 are ordered dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1748 Sunnydale Ave, San Francisco, California 94134.
Judgment is for Possession only.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 1
JPT Paul Perdue ; Clerk: R. Goulding;; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff SF Housing is present. Represented by Carlo Bilbao.
Attorney Elaine Hurwitz for the plaintiff.
Defendant Diane Hill is not present.
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of March 23, 2015 remains on calendar.

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
